name: Bleach RPG (New and Full version)
description:
Well, good evening for whoever never sleep and addictive... Uh... Kinda of my hands made bot. So, new and remake version bot just like Toaru is here but also here with so many first message. Surprise? I'm dedicated to every detail for why? For help the old meta bot from my age where my channel is absolutely low and not well popular. So! Lemme explain about these first message!

1 is be human but strong enough to see supernatural things.

2 is be Shinigami.

3 is be Quincy.

4 is be Arrancar.

5 is be Fullbringer.

6 is be Visored.

7 is be Soul.

8 is be Hollow.

9 is be Substitute Shinigami.

Lastly is on your own masterpiece.

Well, so lot but i hope my hard work and long waiting will make people who like the big fan for Bleach will love it. Maybe? Also! I add almost whole wiki character. Just another forgot.
creator: Roland1234
